arts.ttl: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany addresses “risky” style of play, status of Leroy Sané and Thomas Müller ahead of Eintracht Frankfurt showdown
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany is solely focused on walking into Eintracht Frankfurt’s stadium and leaving with three points on Sunday. We have 100% confidence in all our players, Leroy is one of them,” said Kompany.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, can Kompany afford to keep ignoring Thomas Müller, and more!
arts.sum: With one draw and one loss in the last two games, Vincent Kompany is suddenly feeling the pressure now. To make matters worse, Jamal Musiala is officially sidelined with a hip injury, and the team has no one who can take over his role as the main attacking midfielder.

arts.ttl: Bayern rivals Leverkusen and Dortmund drop points in Bundesliga
arts.sum: Bayern Munich won without playing on Saturday as Bundesliga rivals Bayer Leverkusen and Borussia Dortmund dropped points to modest opponents. Dortmund slumped at Union Berlin to a 2-1 defeat without injured forward Karim Adeyemi, who starred in the team’s 7-1 rout of Celtic in the Champions League on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Bayern München preview: Bayern regroup after European defeat
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany's Bayern Munich will aim to recover from their recent Champions League loss on Wednesday as they head to Deutsche Bank Park to take on Eintracht Frankfurt in the Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Toni Kroos warns Bayern Munich against getting too overhyped with decent start to season
arts.sum: The 1-0 loss at Villa Park in the Champions League marks the first defeat of the season for the Rekordmeister across all competitions, following closely on the heels of a 1-1 draw with Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga just a few days earlier. Former Bayern and Germany midfielder Lothar Matthäus recently expressed his delight with Bayern’s season thus far and made a bold comparison to the Pep Guardiola-era Bayern teams of the past.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed fresh Jamal Musiala transfer update as talks confirmed
arts.sum: Bayern Munich sporting director Max Eberl has expressed positivity over the club's chances of tying down rumoured Arsenal target Jamal Musiala to a new contract after recent discussions. This comment echoes the thoughts of club CEO Herbert Hainer, who told Sky Germany previously he hopes Musiala can become heir to Bayern great Thomas Muller and play for them for the next 20 years.

arts.ttl: Serge Gnabry praises the “hunger, motivation” Vincent Kompany has instilled in the players of Bayern Munich
arts.sum: “Not winning a trophy has given us motivation, I would say so, of course,” Bayern winger Serge Gnabry said, as captured by @iMiaSanMia . We’re coming here to win the game.

arts.ttl: Paul Wanner praises Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl, Christoph Freund and Richard Kitzbichler for help on “journey” to total maturity
arts.sum: Speaking to the official English Bundesliga website, as captured by @iMiaSanMia, Wanner confirmed this contact and said the following: “Richard Kitzbichler, Christoph Freund and Max Eberl are important and I speak to them a lot. Now, he is joined by Eberl and Freund in giving Wanner attention as the 18-year-old makes waves in the Bundesliga with Heidenheim.

arts.ttl: Thomas Muller makes confident Bayern Munich Champions League prediction despite Aston Villa loss
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were beaten 1-0 at Villa Park on Wednesday night after smashing nine goals past Dinamo Zagreb in their opening match but Thomas Muller ins't worried

arts.ttl: Power Rankings: The best teams in Europe
arts.sum: Real Madrid's shock defeat to LOSC Lille and Bayern Munich's equally shocking 1-0 defeat to Aston Villa grabbed most of the column space, while some was also saved for Juventus's dramatic win over RB Leipzig too. Borussia Dortmund earn a spot in the rankings this week thanks to their thumping 7-1 win over an in-form Celtic side in the Champions League in midweek.
